executionHistory.evidence: Artifact-only fix: added 4 trace-ID-bearing DoD bullets (SCN-024-02 and SCN-024-03 in Scope 1; SCN-024-05 and SCN-024-06 in Scope 2) to specs/024-design-doc-reconciliation/scopes.md with raw grep/awk/find evidence and `docs/smackerel.md`/`internal/connector/` source pointers; embedded the `docs/smackerel.md` path token in the Manual Test Plan rows for SCN-024-03/04/05/06 so the concrete-test-file check resolves; generated specs/024-design-doc-reconciliation/scenario-manifest.json covering all 6 SCN-024-* scenarios; appended BUG-024-001 cross-reference section to specs/024-design-doc-reconciliation/report.md. Pre-fix baseline was RESULT: FAILED (10 failures, 4 unmapped scenarios). Output recorded inline in report.md > Validation Evidence and Pre-fix Reproduction.
